---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-container}
::: {.hero-text}
# Hello, I'm Asif Kachroo

I am a highly motivated IT Support Technician specializing in enterprise infrastructure, endpoint management, and identity access control. With hands-on experience supporting both laboratory and corporate environments, I transform complex technical challenges into secure, scalable, and seamless solutions.

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="resume.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">View Resume</a>
  <a href="certifications.qmd" class="btn btn-primary" style="background-color: transparent !important; border: 2px solid #7A82AB !important; color: #2E1F27 !important;">Certifications</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.hero-photo}
![](images/headshot.jpeg)
:::
:::

::: {style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; text-align: center;"}
## Core Competencies {style="margin-bottom: 3rem; color: #2E1F27; font-size: 2.2rem;"}
  
<ul style="list-style: none; padding-left: 0; margin-bottom: 5rem;">
<li style="margin-bottom: 3rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
<i class="bi bi-laptop" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #7A82AB; line-height: 1;"></i>
<div>
<h3 style="margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #2E1F27;">Endpoint Management</h3>
<p style="margin: 0; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 1.15rem; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;">Administering enterprise environments through Microsoft Intune and JAMF. Proficient in device provisioning, configuration profiles, and enforcing security compliance across Windows and macOS systems.</p>
</div>
</li>
  
<li style="margin-bottom: 3rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
<i class="bi bi-shield-lock" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #7A82AB; line-height: 1;"></i>
<div>
<h3 style="margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #2E1F27;">Identity & Access</h3>
<p style="margin: 0; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 1.15rem; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;">Expertise in Active Directory and Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), managing user provisioning, RBAC, and enforcing strict identity access controls in highly regulated environments.</p>
</div>
</li>

<li style="margin-bottom: 3rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
<i class="bi bi-hdd-network" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #7A82AB; line-height: 1;"></i>
<div>
<h3 style="margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #2E1F27;">Enterprise Networking</h3>
<p style="margin: 0; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 1.15rem; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;">Configuring and supporting Cisco Meraki infrastructure, deploying VLANs, structuring cabling, and executing Ekahau wireless site surveys to optimize enterprise wireless networks.</p>
</div>
</li>
</ul>

## Connect with Me {style="margin-bottom: 2rem; color: #2E1F27; font-size: 2.2rem;"}

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 4rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/asifkachroo12345-dev" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary" style="background-color: transparent !important; border: 2px solid #7A82AB !important; color: #2E1F27 !important;"><i class="bi bi-github" style="margin-right: 8px;"></i> GitHub</a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/asif-kachroo-5b435b238/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary" style="background-color: transparent !important; border: 2px solid #7A82AB !important; color: #2E1F27 !important;"><i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="margin-right: 8px;"></i> LinkedIn</a>
</div>
:::
